scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply quizmaker-app-database --local -c wrangler.jsonc
scripts.migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply quizmaker-app-database --remote -c wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:with-db: npm run migrate:remote && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.preview: npm run migrate:local && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
